version_description: Corrected some lyrics, improved chords for intermediate players.

versions.version_description: Easier to play out and longer breaks for your sax player to really get in the groove.
The solo is a different type of solo and i explain a good way to strum. I also explain how to give it a better jazz feel to the song with the strumming.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Title         : Careless Whisper
Artist        : George Michael/Wham (credited outside US as a Solo)
Composer      : George Michael/ Andrew Ridgeley
Album         : Make it Big (1984)
Tuning        : Standard Tuning
Difficulty    : Intermediate
Tabber        : Sonaris
Chords to Know:

Dm      [xx0211] or [557765]
[ch]Gm7[/ch]     [353333]
[ch]Am7[/ch]     [x02010]
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [113231]

[Intro]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]
                           Oh..oh..oh[/tab]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I feel so unsure,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch] 
As I take your hand and lead you to the dance floor.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]                
As the music dies, something in your eyes,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] 
Calls to mind a silver screen,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
And all its sad goodbyes.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch] 
I know you're not a fool.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                             [ch]Am7[/ch]
And waste the chance that I've been given.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch] 
The way I danced with you whoo hoo - oh yeah[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Time can never mend,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch] 
The careless whispers of a good friend.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
To the heart and mind, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ignorance is kind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
There's no comfort in the truth, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Pain is all you'll find.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch] 
I know you're not a fool.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                             [ch]Am7[/ch]
And waste the chance that I've been given.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch] 
The way I danced with you whoo hoo - oh yeah[/tab]

What am I without your love?

[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
Tonight the music seems so loud, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                
I wish that we could lose the crowd.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Maybe it's better this way, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
We hurt each other with the things we want to say.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
We could have been so good together, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
We could have made this dance forever... [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
But now, who's gonna dance with me?[/tab]

Please stay.

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch] 
I know you're not a fool.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                             [ch]Am7[/ch]
And waste the chance that I've been given.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch] 
The way I danced with you whoo hoo - oh yeah[/tab]

Background Chorus:
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
(Now that you're gone... Now that you're gone...) [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
(Now that you're gone...) Was what I did so wrong?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
So wrong that you had to leave me alone?[/tab]
